item.title: 曝 DeepSeek 首次启动融资，估值不低于百亿美元
item.guid: 曝-DeepSeek-首次启动融资，估值不低于百亿美元
item.description:
According to The Information, DeepSeek is seeking external funding for the first time, planning to raise at least $300 million at a valuation exceeding $10 billion. 据 The Information 报道，DeepSeek 正首次寻求外部融资，计划以超 100 亿美元的估值，筹集至少 3 亿美元资金。

Insiders revealed that DeepSeek is engaging with investors to bolster its capital reserves. It is understood that DeepSeek was previously exclusively funded by hedge fund High-Flyer Quant and had repeatedly rejected investment offers from top venture capitalists and tech giants. 知情人士透露，DeepSeek 正与投资者接触以充实资金储备。据了解，DeepSeek 此前由对冲基金幻方量化独家提供资金支持，并曾多次拒绝顶级风投及科技巨头的投资报价。

The report points out that founder and CEO Liang Wenfeng's change in funding strategy this time is primarily aimed at addressing the high costs of model development, by expanding computing power investment and improving compensation to cope with fierce talent and technology competition. 报道指出，创始人兼 CEO 梁文锋此次改变资金策略，主要目的是为了应对高昂的模型开发成本，通过扩大算力投资和提高薪酬待遇来应对激烈的人才与技术竞争。

According to reports, DeepSeek has not yet launched a new generation of models since the release of its R1 model in early 2025, and has recently faced a loss of core researchers. Luo Fuli, a core contributor to the V3 model, has joined Xiaomi, while another core researcher, Guo Daya, has moved to ByteDance with a high salary. 据报道，自 2025 年初发布 R1 模型以来，DeepSeek 尚未推出新一代模型，且近期面临核心研究人员流失。V3 模型核心贡献者罗福莉已加盟小米，另一核心研究员郭达雅则高薪转投字节跳动。

Furthermore, the V4 model, originally scheduled for release in February this year, has been repeatedly delayed due to engineering and technical challenges, such as the need for out-of-the-box adaptation for Huawei chips. 此外，原定于今年 2 月发布的 V4 模型，因需进行华为芯片的开箱即用适配等工程技术难题，已数度推迟发布时间。

🔗 Related Reading: On the Eve of V4 Release, DeepSeek Reportedly Seeks First Funding, Valued Over $10 Billion 🔗 相关阅读： V4 发布前夕，DeepSeek 被曝首次融资，估值超 100 亿美元

item.title: Sora 之父官宣离职
item.guid: Sora-之父官宣离职
item.description:
Just now, Bill Peebles, the "father of Sora," officially announced his departure; on the same day, Kevin Weil, former Chief Product Officer at OpenAI, also posted: "Today is my last day at OpenAI." 就在刚刚，Sora 之父 Bill Peebles 正式官宣离职；同一天，OpenAI 前首席产品官 Kevin Weil 也发帖：今天是我在 OpenAI 的最后一天。

🔗 Related Reading: Breaking News: Sora's Father Officially Resigns! OpenAI is in a Mess 🔗 相关阅读： 突发，Sora 之父官宣离职！OpenAI 乱成一锅粥了

Regarding core project R&D, Peebles previously led the development of Sora, a high-fidelity 1080p multi-camera video generation model; meanwhile, the "OpenAI for Science" exclusive project group, which Weil was responsible for before his departure, has been disbanded. 在核心项目研发方面，Peebles 此前主导了高保真 1080p 多镜头视频生成模型 Sora 的开发；而 Weil 离任前负责的「OpenAI for Science」专属项目组已被拆分。

Alongside executive personnel changes, OpenAI is undergoing intensive internal structural adjustments. According to foreign media disclosures, the Prism team, which developed the scientific workbench product, has been merged into the AI programming product Codex department. 伴随高管人事变动，OpenAI 正进行密集的内部架构调整。据外媒披露，科学工作台产品 Prism 团队已被并入 AI 编程产品 Codex 部门。

The company's current strategic focus has clearly narrowed to enterprise clients and programming business, with plans to integrate multiple standalone applications, including Prism and Atlas, into a single platform to enhance commercialization efficiency for professional workflows. 公司目前的战略焦点已明确收窄至企业客户与编程业务，并计划将包括 Prism、Atlas 在内的多个独立应用整合至单一平台，以提升面向专业工作流的商业化效率。

It is reported that before this large-scale business contraction, OpenAI had announced the shutdown of the standalone Sora application a month ago, with the official reason given as "lack of a sustainable business model." 据悉，本次业务大范围收缩前，OpenAI 已于一个月前宣布关停 Sora 独立应用，官方给出的原因为「缺乏可持续的商业模式」。

Under continuous pressure from competitor Anthropic in the enterprise market, OpenAI is accelerating the divestment of high-investment, low-conversion exploratory projects to meet increasingly urgent revenue and commercialization targets. 在竞品 Anthropic 于企业端市场施加的持续压力下，OpenAI 内部正加快剥离高投入、低转化率的探索型项目，以应对日益迫切的营收与商业化指标。

item.title: 一季度中国手机市场：华为苹果增长，小米跌幅最大
item.guid: 一季度中国手机市场：华为苹果增长，小米跌幅最大
item.description:
Yesterday, market research firm Counterpoint Research released its latest research report: 昨天，市场研究机构 Counterpoint Research 发布最新研究报告：

In Q1 2026, China's smartphone market shipments decreased by 4% year-on-year, with Huawei reclaiming the top spot with a 20% market share, while Apple became the fastest-growing leading brand with a 20% year-on-year increase.

Specifically: 具体来看：

    Huawei achieved a 2% year-on-year growth in Q1, with a market share of 20%, marking a new single-quarter high since Q4 2020. The report points out that the stable supply of Mate 80 and Enjoy 90 series, along with cost buffering from the local supply chain, were key factors supporting its ascent to the top;

    Apple ranked second, with Q1 shipments increasing by 20% year-on-year, driven by the continued strong sales of the iPhone 17 series and subsidy promotions, making it the fastest-growing brand among the top six manufacturers;

    Xiaomi, on the other hand, saw its shipments decline by 35% year-on-year in the first quarter, ranking fifth, due to core models performing below expectations and a conservative pricing strategy.

Ivan Lam, Senior Analyst at Counterpoint, pointed out that soaring component costs weakened the pull of Lunar New Year promotions and pushed up retail prices, but the high-end market remains resilient, driven by imaging, foldable screens, and AI agent functionalities. Counterpoint 高级分析师 Ivan Lam 指出，零部件成本飙升削弱了春节促销的拉动作用并推高了零售价，但高端市场在影像、折叠屏及 AI 代理功能的推动下仍具韧性。

It is worth noting that analytical agencies expect high storage costs to persist throughout 2026, leading to a "double blow" for terminal manufacturers, facing shrinking shipments and thinning profit margins. 值得关注的是，分析机构预计，存储成本的高企状态将贯穿 2026 全年，导致终端厂商面临出货量萎缩与利润率变薄的「双重打击」。

item.title: OpenAI 豪掷 200 亿，只为投资英伟达「备胎」
item.guid: OpenAI-豪掷-200-亿，只为投资英伟达「备胎」
item.description:
According to The Information, OpenAI has agreed to pay AI chip manufacturer Cerebras over $20 billion (approximately 136.4 billion RMB) over the next three years to purchase computing power services, in exchange for a partial equity stake in the latter. 据 The Information 报道， OpenAI 已同意在未来三年内向 AI 芯片制造商 Cerebras 支付超 200 亿美元（约合人民币 1364 亿元）以购买算力服务，并以此换取后者的部分股权。

According to multiple sources, OpenAI's promised $20 billion expenditure in this agreement is double the previously rumored amount. 据多位知情人士透露，OpenAI 在本次协议中承诺的 200 亿美元支出是此前传闻金额的两倍。

In exchange, OpenAI will acquire a minority stake in Cerebras through warrants; if OpenAI's final expenditure reaches $30 billion, its equity stake could be as high as 10%. 作为交换，OpenAI 将通过认股权证获得 Cerebras 的少数股权；若 OpenAI 的最终支出规模达到 300 亿美元，其获取的股权比例最高可达 10%。

Additionally, OpenAI has agreed to provide Cerebras with approximately $1 billion in dedicated funding for the development of data centers to run OpenAI's artificial intelligence products. 此外，OpenAI 还同意向 Cerebras 提供约 10 亿美元的专项资金，用于开发运行 OpenAI 人工智能产品的数据中心。

In February this year, OpenAI released its first model designed specifically for real-time programming, GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark. This model is also the first outcome of OpenAI's collaboration with Cerebras. 今年 2 月，OpenAI 发布了首款专为实时编程设计的模型 GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark。而该模型也是 OpenAI 与 Cerebras 合作的首个成果。

It is reported that the GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark provided by OpenAI runs on Cerebras's Wafer Scale Engine 3. 据悉，OpenAI 所提供的 GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark 运行在 Cerebras 的 Wafer Scale Engine 3 上。

It is worth mentioning that the WSE-3 boasts 4 trillion transistors and 900,000 AI cores, which is 19 times more transistors and 28 times more computing power than Nvidia's B200; additionally, thanks to making the chip directly from an entire wafer, the WSE-3 has 206 times faster memory bandwidth than Nvidia's latest generation NVLink. 值得一提的是，WSE-3 拥有 4 万亿个晶体管 和 90 万个 AI 核心，比英伟达 B200 多了 19 倍晶体管与 28 倍的算力；另外得益于整块晶圆直接做芯片，WSE-3 拥有比英伟达最新一代 NVLink 快 206 倍的内存带宽。

item.title: 雷军：小米未来几年不会做十万元以内车型
item.guid: 雷军：小米未来几年不会做十万元以内车型
item.description:
At 6:30 AM yesterday, Xiaomi founder Lei Jun began a live broadcast of the long-distance range test of the new generation Xiaomi SU7 from Beijing to Shanghai as scheduled, charging only once midway. 昨日上午 6 点半，小米创始人雷军如期开启新一代小米 SU7 从北京到上海的长途续航测试直播，中途仅充一次电。

At 9:40 PM last night, Lei Jun and his team successfully arrived at the Xiaomi 5G Future Center industrial park in Jinqiao, Shanghai, after a journey of 15 hours, covering an actual distance of 1313 kilometers, with 19 kilometers of range remaining upon arrival. 昨晚 21:40，雷军一行人成功抵达位于上海金桥的小米 5G 未来中心工区，全程历时 15 小时，实际行驶里程达 1313 公里，抵达时车辆续航仍剩余 19 公里。

During the live broadcast, Lei Jun responded to several hot topics. Regarding netizens' concerns about "whether Xiaomi will launch models under 100,000 yuan," he stated: For electric vehicles to be intelligent, costs are difficult to control within 100,000 yuan. "A highly intelligent car, priced at 100,000 yuan, will be difficult to achieve within 10 years." 直播途中，雷军就多个热点话题作出回应。针对网友关心的「小米是否会推出 10 万元以内车型」，他表示：电动汽车要做好智能化，成本难以控制在 10 万元以内，「高度智能的车，10 年之内 10 万块钱的车都很难做得到」。

He also stated that Xiaomi's goal is to become one of the top five car manufacturers globally, building cars comparable to Porsche and Tesla, and promoting the advancement of China's automotive industry towards high-end. 他同时表示， 小米的目标是成为全球前五的车厂，造出媲美保时捷、特斯拉的车，推动中国汽车产业向高端化迈进。

During the live broadcast, Lei Jun also responded to the long-standing "marketing master" label attached to him by the outside world. He stated that there are "schemes and tricks" behind this label, intending to make the public believe that Xiaomi's cars rely on marketing rather than product quality. "They are praising me on the surface, but actually slandering me." 雷军在直播中还回应了外界长期以来给他贴上「营销大师」标签一事。他表示，这一标签背后「有阴谋诡计」，意图让外界认为小米的车靠的是营销而非产品质量，「他们表面上在夸我，实际上在黑我」。

According to 36Kr Auto, Xiaomi Group also announced via internal email on the same day: 另据 36 氪汽车消息，同日小米集团通过内部邮件宣布：

Hu Zhengnan has been appointed Vice President of Xiaomi Group and CTO of the Automotive Department; Song Gang has been appointed Vice President of Xiaomi Group's Automotive Department and Chief of Staff. This marks the first time Xiaomi Auto has established a CTO position since its announcement in 2021.

It is understood that both new executives have over twenty years of experience in the automotive industry, with careers spanning traditional car manufacturers and the new energy vehicle sector: 据了解，两位新任高管在汽车行业均有超过二十年的从业积累，履历横跨传统车企与新能源赛道：

    Hu Zhengnan entered the automotive industry in 1997, accumulating nearly thirty years of experience, and is one of the most representative vehicle engineering experts of the generation that witnessed the independent rise of China's automotive industry;

    Song Gang joined Tesla's Shanghai Gigafactory in 2018 and completed the mass production and delivery of the Model 3 in the same year the factory was built (2019).

The report also pointed out that, as of now, Xiaomi Auto's R&D personnel are close to 10,000. 报道还指出，截至目前，小米汽车研发人员接近万人。

item.title: iOS 27 AI 功能前瞻：视觉智能更完善
item.guid: iOS-27-AI-功能前瞻：视觉智能更完善
item.description:
According to MacRumors, Apple will introduce 4 new Apple Intelligence features in iOS 27. 据 MacRumors 报道，苹果将会在 iOS 27 中引入 4 项新的 Apple Intelligence 功能。

Backend code confirmed by MacRumors shows that this update mainly covers three core modules: visual intelligence, Wallet, and browser: 从 MacRumors 确认的后端代码显示，此次更新主要覆盖视觉智能、钱包及浏览器三大核心模块：

    Visual Intelligence: Supports scanning food nutrition labels and directly syncing them to the Health App; automatically identifies and extracts phone and address information from printed materials and adds them to contacts.

    Apple Wallet: The App will leverage AI visual technology to support generating digital credentials directly by scanning physical event tickets or membership cards.

    Safari Browser: Introduces an AI smart classification feature that automatically names "Tab Groups" based on current web page content.

It is reported that Apple will officially release iOS 27 at the Global Developers Conference (WWDC26) in June this year. 据悉，苹果将在今年 6 月的全球开发者大会（WWDC26）上，正式发布 iOS 27。

item.title: 彭志辉：智元机器人已能够自己造血，目前不缺钱
item.guid: 彭志辉：智元机器人已能够自己造血，目前不缺钱
item.description:
According to IT Home, at the APC2026 Zhiyuan Partner Conference held yesterday, Peng Zhihui, co-founder, president, and CTO of Zhiyuan Robotics, pointed out in communication with the media: 据 IT 之家消息，昨日举办的 APC2026 智元合作伙伴大会上，智元机器人联合创始人、总裁兼 CTO 彭志辉在与媒体沟通中指出：

In 2025, the company's revenue has exceeded 1.05 billion yuan, and this year it may grow several times again. Our commercialization pace is very fast, we can generate our own revenue, and frankly, the company is not short of money at present.

Peng Zhihui stated that Zhiyuan's overall operational pace and development plan are currently very well executed, and the company knows which direction it should go. 彭志辉表示，目前智元整体的运营节奏、发展规划都做得非常好，知道自己该往那个方向走。

He also revealed that Zhiyuan will also spin off some of its very important business units for financing , and their valuation has exceeded 3 billion US dollars in a very short time, with a growth rate even faster than Zhiyuan's initial stage. 其还透露， 智元也会把旗下一些非常重点的业务部门拆出去做融资 ，很短时间内估值也超过了 30 亿美元，增速比智元起步时候还要快。

In addition, Peng Zhihui also stated at the conference that Unitree is a remarkable company. "It has been established for ten years, and it has done very well in terms of its core technology. Its product scale and efficiency are very high, and it is very much worth learning from ." 另外，会上彭志辉还表示，宇树是一家非常了不起的公司，「它成立有十年了，在本体方面做得非常好，产品规模量、效率都非常高， 非常值得我们学习 。」

Regarding Tesla Optimus, Peng Zhihui said that from their current promotional videos, the effect is very good, but since it has not yet been mass-produced, it is difficult to make an evaluation at present . 谈及特斯拉 Optimus，彭志辉表示，从目前他们的宣传视频来看，效果非常好， 但由于还没有大规模量产，目前不好做出评价 。

He pointed out that overseas has an advantage in terms of original innovation, but domestic companies might be faster in engineering implementation and commercialization. 其指出，海外在源创新层面较有优势，但国内在工程落地和商业化的速度方面可能会更快。

item.title: 去年汽车业利润率仅 4.1%，3 家亏钱卖车、赛力斯单车利润近万元
item.guid: 去年汽车业利润率仅-4.1%，3-家亏钱卖车、赛力斯单车利润近万元
item.description:
According to Yicai, last year, the scale of production and sales in China's automotive industry reached a new historical high, but fierce price competition continued to squeeze car manufacturers' profit margins. 据第一财经报道，去年国内汽车行业产销规模再创历史新高，但激烈的价格竞争持续压缩车企盈利空间。

The report stated that after compiling the per-vehicle price and profit of 12 mainstream listed car companies, it was found that the profitability levels of each car company varied significantly, and no company's per-vehicle profit exceeded 10,000 yuan. 报道称，在整理了 12 家主流上市车企的单车价格与单车利润后发现，各家车企盈利水平分化显著，所有企业单车利润均未突破万元。

Among them, Seres ranked first in average per-vehicle price and profit: an average per-vehicle price of about 304,800 yuan and a per-vehicle profit of 9,936 yuan; while Chery and BYD ranked second and third in per-vehicle profit, with 7,228 yuan (average per-vehicle price of 103,500 yuan) and 6,398 yuan (average per-vehicle price of 140,900 yuan) respectively. 其中赛力斯的单车均价及利润位居榜首：单车均价约 30.48 万元，单车利润 9936 元；而奇瑞及比亚迪的单车利润位居第二、第三，分别为 7228 元（单车均价 10.35 万元）、6398 元（单车均价 14.09 万元）。

As for new energy vehicle startups, among "Weixiaoli" (Nio, Xpeng, Li Auto), only Li Auto achieved a performance of "average per-vehicle price above 250,000 yuan, per-vehicle profit of 5,857 yuan." Nio and Xpeng both incurred losses: Nio's average per-vehicle price was above 250,000 yuan, with a per-vehicle loss of approximately 38,000 yuan (on a Non-GAAP basis); Xpeng's average per-vehicle price was about 159,200 yuan, with an adjusted per-vehicle loss of 1,071 yuan. 而新势力方面，「蔚小理」中仅理想获得「单车均价 25 万元以上，单车利润 5857 元」的表现，蔚来及小鹏均为亏损：蔚来单车均价 25 万元以上，单车亏损约 3.8 万元（按 Non-GAAP 口径）；小鹏单车均价约 15.92 万元，经调整单车亏损 1071 元。

From an industry-wide perspective, data from the China Passenger Car Association shows that last year, China's automobile production and sales increased by 10.4% and 9.4% year-on-year, respectively. Full-year revenue reached 11.18 trillion yuan, costs were as high as 9.85 trillion yuan, and profit was only 461 billion yuan, with a profit margin of 4.1%, a historical low, lower than the national industrial average profit margin of 5.31%. 从行业整体来看，乘联会数据显示，去年我国汽车产销量同比分别增长 10.4% 和 9.4%，全年收入达 11.18 万亿元，成本高达 9.85 万亿元，利润仅为 4610 亿元，利润率为 4.1%，处于历史低位，低于全国工业 5.31% 的平均利润率。

item.title: 本田暂停部分在华燃油车厂
item.guid: 本田暂停部分在华燃油车厂
item.description:
According to Reuters, Honda plans to close at least one joint-venture fuel vehicle factory in China this year to cope with fierce competition in China's new energy vehicle market and the decline in its sales in China. 据路透社报道，本田计划于今年内关闭至少一家在华合资燃油车工厂，以应对中国新能源汽车市场的激烈竞争及在华销量下滑的颓势。

Sources revealed that Honda will officially cease production at one of its joint venture fuel vehicle plants with GAC Group in June this year, and is evaluating suspending operations at another plant with Dongfeng Motor Group next year. 知情人士透露，本田将于今年 6 月正式停产与广汽集团合资的其中一家燃油车工厂，并正评估于明年暂停与东风汽车集团合资的另一家工厂的运营。

Currently, Honda's two major joint ventures in China each own two internal combustion engine plants with an annual capacity of 240,000 vehicles and a smaller electric vehicle plant. 目前，本田在华两大合资企业各拥有两座年产能 24 万辆的内燃机工厂及一座较小规模的电动汽车工厂。

The report points out that if each of the two joint ventures closes a fuel vehicle plant, Honda's annual fuel vehicle production capacity in China will be halved from 960,000 units to 480,000 units, and its total annual production capacity will also sharply decrease from 1.2 million units to approximately 720,000 units. 报道指出，若两家合资企业各关闭一座燃油车工厂，本田在华的燃油车年产能将由 96 万辆腰斩至 48 万辆，总年产能也将从 120 万辆锐减至约 72 万辆。

item.title: 零跑高级副总裁：肯定不会亏钱造车的
item.guid: 零跑高级副总裁：肯定不会亏钱造车的
item.description:
According to IT Home, after the D19 launch event on the evening of April 16, Cao Li, Senior Vice President of Leapmotor, discussed the pricing of the Leapmotor D19 during a media interview. 据 IT 之家消息，4 月 16 日晚间的 D19 上市发布会后，零跑汽车高级副总裁曹力在接受媒体采访时，谈到了零跑 D19 的定价。

Cao Li stated that after the D19's release, Leapmotor's 'core' in everyone's eyes remains unchanged — consistently and diligently making products. Whether it's the A series under 100,000 yuan or the luxury D series models approaching 300,000 yuan, they adhere to cost-plus pricing, ensuring customers get better quality and higher configuration products at the same price. 曹力表示，D19 发布后，大家眼中零跑的「核心」还是没变 —— 始终踏踏实实做产品，不管是 10 万以下的 A 系列，还是接近 30 万的豪华 D 系列车型，都坚持成本定价，以同样价格买到更好品质、更高配置的产品。

He also expressed hope that everyone would see that Leapmotor can not only produce high-volume cars selling tens of thousands of units monthly but also top-tier models that can compete with million-level luxury cars, and further hopes this luxury car can achieve monthly sales of tens of thousands of units. 其还表示，同时也希望大家看到，零跑不仅能造月销上万台的走量车，也造得出能与百万级豪华车抗衡的顶配车型，更希望这款豪华车能月销几万台。

Regarding the D19's pricing, he emphasized that Leapmotor will certainly not lose money making cars and will have a reasonable gross profit margin. The ability to maintain an accessible price with high configurations is due to efforts on all fronts, with the core being multi-faceted cost control. 谈及 D19 的定价，他强调， 零跑肯定不会亏钱造车，会有合理的毛利率。之所以能在高配置下保持亲民价格，是方方面面的努力，而核心在于多方面的成本控制。

Additionally, Leapmotor founder Zhu Jiang also mentioned at the press conference that the technological foundation supporting the D19's starting price of 219,800 yuan comes from Leapmotor's long-standing full-domain self-research system. 另外，零跑汽车创始人朱江在发布会上也提到，支撑（D19）21.98 万元起售价的技术底座，源自零跑长期推行的全域自研体系。

According to currently available information, 65% of Leapmotor's core components are self-developed and self-manufactured. Around its vehicle assembly plant, Leapmotor has built 17 component factories nearby, covering everything from battery packs and electric drive systems to cockpit domain controllers, and even lamp components and thermal management modules. 根据目前公开的资料，零跑全车 65% 的核心零部件均实现了自研自造。在整车总装工厂周边，零跑就近建设了 17 个零部件工厂，从电池包、电驱系统到座舱域控制器，再到车灯组件和热管理模块。

item.title: 吉利召回多台极星 4：存在热失控风险
item.guid: 吉利召回多台极星-4：存在热失控风险
item.description:
According to information from the State Administration for Market Regulation, Zhejiang Geely Automobile Co., Ltd. has filed a recall plan with the State Administration for Market Regulation in accordance with the requirements of the 'Regulations on the Administration of Defective Automobile Products Recall' and the 'Implementation Measures for the Regulations on the Administration of Defective Automobile Products Recall'. 据国家市场监督管理总局信息，浙江吉利汽车有限公司根据《缺陷汽车产品召回管理条例》和《缺陷汽车产品召回管理条例实施办法》的要求，向国家市场监督管理总局备案了召回计划。

Recall number S2026M0045V: Starting from May 16, 2026, a total of 1,473 domestically produced Polestar 4 pure electric vehicles from the 2023-2024 model year, equipped with 86kWh power batteries and produced between November 16, 2023, and May 24, 2024, will be recalled.

It is understood that some vehicles within the scope of this recall, due to inconsistencies in the manufacturing of high-voltage power battery components, may experience an abnormal increase in internal resistance of the power battery during long-term use, which could lead to a decrease in some power battery performance, and in extreme cases, could lead to thermal runaway of the power battery, posing a safety hazard. 据悉，本次召回范围内的部分车辆，由于高压动力电池的部件制造一致性原因，长期使用动力电池内阻会异常升高，可能导致部分动力电池性能下降，极端情况下可能导致动力电池热失控，存在安全隐患。

The recall measure is to replace all power battery modules in the recalled vehicles free of charge to eliminate safety hazards. Polestar advises customers not to charge the high-voltage battery beyond 70% before replacing the power battery module to reduce the risk of thermal runaway. 召回措施为对召回范围内车辆的动力电池模组全部进行免费更换，以消除安全隐患。极星汽车建议客户在更换动力电池模组前不要对高压电池充电超过 70% 以降低热失控风险。

item.title: 赛力斯加入宝马奔驰在华超充合资公司
item.guid: 赛力斯加入宝马奔驰在华超充合资公司
item.description:
Yesterday, EANQ, the ultra-charging joint venture established by BMW and Mercedes-Benz in China, announced that Seres has officially joined as a new investor, holding an equal share with existing shareholders, with each of the three shareholders owning 33.3% of the joint venture. 昨天，宝马与奔驰在中国成立的超充合资公司逸安启宣布，赛力斯作为新的投资方正式加入，与现有股东方持股比例相等，三家股东各持有该合资公司 33.3% 的股份。

Through this equity investment, AITO will participate in supporting EANQ's luxury ultra-charging infrastructure construction. 通过此次股权投资，问界将参与支持逸安启豪华超充基础设施建设。

At the cooperation level, the three parties will jointly explore EANQ's development opportunities, focusing on expanding network coverage, key regional layouts, and service innovation. BMW, AITO, and Mercedes-Benz users will not only enjoy EANQ's high-quality basic services but also receive brand-exclusive benefits such as reserved charging and priority power allocation. 在合作层面，三方将共同挖掘逸安启的发展机遇，重点聚焦网络覆盖扩大、重点区域布局及服务创新。宝马、问界及奔驰用户除可享受逸安启高品质基础服务外，还将获得预约充电、功率优先分配等品牌专属权益。

item.title: 💡 伦敦 AI 大会：软件工程师正在变成「AI 中层管理者」
item.guid: 💡-伦敦-AI-大会：软件工程师正在变成「AI-中层管理者」
item.description:
According to Business Insider, at the recent AI Engineer Europe conference held in London, engineers and industry professionals from companies like Google, Anthropic, and OpenAI gathered to engage in intensive discussions around the management and deployment of AI Agents. 据《商业内幕》报道，日前在伦敦举办的 AI Engineer 欧洲大会上，来自 Google、Anthropic、OpenAI 等公司的工程师和行业人士齐聚一堂，围绕 AI Agent 的管理与部署展开了密集讨论。

OpenAI technologist Ryan Lopopolo pointed out at the opening of the conference that the nature of software engineers' work has fundamentally changed by the end of 2025. OpenAI 技术人员 Ryan Lopopolo 在大会开场便指出，软件工程师的工作性质在 2025 年底已发生根本性转变。

With the rapid evolution of AI tools, the core responsibility of engineers has shifted from personally writing code to 'guiding and unblocking' AI Agents—telling them where to go, what to look at, and correcting them when they make mistakes.

David Soria Parra of Anthropic stated on stage, 'Last year was the year of exploration; this year is the year to truly put these Agents into production.' Anthropic 的 David Soria Parra 在台上表示，「去年是探索之年，今年则是将这些 Agent 真正投入生产的一年。」

He predicts that the application scenarios of AI Agents will soon expand from programming to broader knowledge work such as financial analysis and marketing, and the era of "general intelligent agents" is approaching. 他预计，AI Agent 的应用场景将很快从编程领域扩展至财务分析、市场营销等更广泛的知识工作，「通用智能体」时代即将到来。

At the conference, "guardrails" and "context engineering" became high-frequency terms. The latter refers to designing prompts and contexts carefully to enable intelligent agents to perform better while consuming less computing power. Attendees generally believe that 2026 will be a critical turning point for AI agents to move from experimentation to large-scale implementation. 大会上，「护栏」（guardrails）与「上下文工程」（context engineering）成为高频词汇。后者指的是通过精心设计提示词与上下文，让智能体在消耗更少算力的前提下表现更优。与会者普遍认为，2026 年将是 AI 智能体从实验走向规模化落地的关键节点。

However, Mario Zechner, founder of coding agent Pi, put forward a more cautious stance. He pointed out that AI agents' training data comes from the internet, which is full of low-quality code. 然而，coding agent Pi 的创始人 Mario Zechner 提出了更为审慎的立场。他指出，AI 智能体的训练数据来源于互联网，而互联网上充斥着大量低质量代码。

He advised engineers to "use with caution, don't let the agent make decisions for you," and emphasized that "all decisions it makes are learned from the internet." 他建议工程师「谨慎使用，不要让智能体替你做决策」，并强调「它所做的一切决策，都是从互联网上学来的」。

item.title: 一加 Ace 6 至尊版下周亮相
item.guid: 一加-Ace-6-至尊版下周亮相
item.description:
Yesterday, OnePlus announced that it would officially release the new Ace 6 Ultimate Edition phone next week, along with two accessories: a game controller and an external cooler. 昨天，一加宣布将于下周正式发布 Ace 6 至尊版新机，并同步带来游戏手柄、外置散热器两款配件。

According to reports, after installation, the game controller can provide a control experience similar to a handheld console, equipped with trigger buttons operated by the index finger; when the external cooler is connected, performance limitations can be removed, entering a "berserk state." 据介绍，游戏手柄安装后可为设备带来近似掌机的操控体验，配备由食指操作的扳机键；外置散热器接入后可解除性能限制，进入「暴走状态」。

In terms of hardware specifications, the OnePlus Ace 6 Ultimate Edition is equipped with a MediaTek Dimensity 9500 SoC, a 6.78-inch 1.5K + 165Hz high-refresh rate flat screen; the front camera is 16MP, and the rear uses a dual-camera setup with a 50MP main sensor + 8MP secondary sensor. 硬件规格方面，一加 Ace 6 至尊版搭载联发科天玑 9500 SoC，屏幕为 6.78 英寸 1.5K + 165Hz 高刷直屏；前置摄像头为 16MP，后置采用 50MP 主摄 + 8MP 副摄的双摄组合。

item.title: 智元多款机器人新品亮相
item.guid: 智元多款机器人新品亮相
item.description:
On April 17, the Zhiyuan Partner Conference (APC 2026) was officially held, simultaneously launching four new robot body products, six major AI models, and for the first time, publicly revealing the AIMA (AI Machine Architecture) full-stack ecological technology system. 4 月 17 日，智元合作伙伴大会（APC 2026）正式举行，并同步推出四大本体新品、六大 AI 模型等，并首次公开 AIMA（AI Machine Architecture）全栈生态技术体系。

Robot Body Products: 机器人本体产品：

    Expedition A3 — This year's most comprehensively capable full-size humanoid in the industry: highest thrust-to-weight ratio in the industry, achieving higher athletic ability and flexibility than half-size robots; dual battery packs support hot-swapping, allowing 8-10 hours of continuous work without battery replacement; the industry's first full-size humanoid robot natively supporting interactive intelligent deployment.

    Lingxi X3: The first new-modality humanoid interactive service terminal that integrates intelligence, anthropomorphism, fun, safety, and ease of use.

    Elf G2 Series: Air is extremely lightweight, matching human joint movements, supporting human-machine integrated data acquisition mode; Max has greater load force control.

    Quadruped Robot Kutuo D2 Series: Features adaptive dynamic balance, full-scene environmental understanding, autonomous task planning, real-time anomaly handling, and natural language interaction capabilities.

Six Major Models of Three Intelligences: 三种智能的六大模型：

    Motion Intelligence: Two major foundational models will be launched: a full-body motion control foundational model supporting perception-control fusion (achieving adaptive motion control through environmental perception), and a generative motion control foundational model (generating arbitrary actions in real-time with multi-modal interaction, without pre-arrangement);

    Interactive Intelligence: Building on the already widely applied WITA large model, the industry's first end-to-end embodied multi-modal interactive large model, WITA Omni 1.0, will be released in the third quarter. This model retains conversational emotions, context, tone, environment, and other information, achieving natural, human-like emotional interactive expression, and supports interrupting, cutting in, and correcting mid-conversation;

    Task Intelligence: The GO-3 model will be launched in the third quarter, integrating the ViLLA architecture and world model architecture. It will possess planning and deduction capabilities, as well as reasoning and execution capabilities for complex tasks. Its data scale will be tens to hundreds of times that of GO-2, aiming for significant breakthroughs in success rate, generalization, and long-range task processing.

item.title: Bose SoundLink 系列上线全新「落日暖桃」配色
item.guid: Bose-SoundLink-系列上线全新「落日暖桃」配色
item.description:
Recently, Bose launched its new 2026 color series "Sunset Warm Peach," specifically designed for Bose SoundLink Micro II, Bose SoundLink Flex II, and Bose SoundLink Plus Bluetooth speakers. 日前，Bose 推出 2026 年新色系「落日暖桃」，专为 Bose SoundLink Micro Ⅱ、Bose SoundLink Flex Ⅱ及 Bose SoundLink Plus 蓝牙扬声器而打造。

This "Sunset Warm Peach" captures the bright ambiance unique to the hazy warm season. This soft coral orange hue, blending creativity and vitality, is inspired by fresh peaches and the sensory warmth they evoke, aiming to bring a touch of accessible spring vitality to consumers who pursue individual expression and quality of life. 本次的「落日暖桃」捕捉了朦胧暖季特有的明媚气息，这抹柔和珊瑚橘色调，融汇创造力与活力，灵感源自新鲜蜜桃及其唤起的感官暖意，旨在为追求个性表达与生活品质的消费者，带来一抹触手可及的春日活力。

The three new "Sunset Warm Peach" Bluetooth speakers are available starting today at Bose official stores, official online platforms, and authorized dealer stores. 三款「落日暖桃」新色蓝牙扬声器，即日起在 Bose 官方门店、官方线上平台及授权经销商门店同步发售。

item.title: 可画发布 Canva AI 2.0：一句话生成完整设计
item.guid: 可画发布-Canva-AI-2.0：一句话生成完整设计
item.description:
Yesterday, Canva officially released the Canva AI 2.0 update, which the company calls "the biggest shift since bringing design from complex desktop software to the browser." 昨天，可画 Canva 正式发布 Canva AI 2.0 更新，官方称为「自将设计从复杂桌面软件带入浏览器以来最大的一次转变」。

After the Canva AI 2.0 update, users can access the platform's full suite of tools through a unified conversational interface, describing their needs in natural language to automatically generate "ready-to-use" complete content. Canva AI 2.0 更新后，用户通过统一的对话界面即可调用平台全套工具，用自然语言描述需求，即可自动生成「直接可用」的完整内容。

Canva AI 2.0 also introduces a persistent memory mechanism that learns users' creative habits over time, automatically maintaining brand style and visual consistency. The new "object-based intelligent editing" feature supports precise adjustments to specific elements in a design via text prompts, without affecting other parts. Canva AI 2.0 还引入了持久记忆机制，能够随时间学习用户的创作习惯，自动保持品牌风格与视觉一致性。新增的「基于对象的智能编辑」功能支持通过文字提示对设计中的特定元素进行精准调整，而不影响其他部分。

In addition, Canva Code now supports HTML import, and the platform has launched a unified connector interface that integrates with third-party tools such as Slack, Gmail, Google Drive, and Calendar. 此外，Canva Code 新增 HTML 导入支持，平台还推出了统一连接器界面，可与 Slack、Gmail、Google Drive、Calendar 等第三方工具集成。

Canva AI 2.0 will be available to Pro (US$120 annually) and higher-tier plan users, while free users can access basic AI features. Canva AI 2.0 将向 Pro（每年 120 美元）及以上套餐用户开放，免费版用户可使用基础 AI 功能。

item.title: 智谱 AutoClaw 开启自进化
item.guid: 智谱-AutoClaw-开启自进化
item.description:
Yesterday, Zhipu's AutoClaw officially launched its self-evolution mechanism and Skill Store, aiming to address the "forgetfulness" pain point of AI agents. 昨天，智谱旗下 AutoClaw（澳龙）正式上线自进化机制与 Skill 商店，旨在解决 AI 智能体「健忘」的痛点。

Under the new mechanism, after each round of dialogue, AutoClaw automatically scans the conversation content, identifies user corrections, preferences, or task pitfalls, and presents them as "evolution request" cards for user approval. Once confirmed by the user, the relevant content will be written into the model's memory, becoming a persistent capability. 新机制下，每轮对话结束后，AutoClaw 会自动扫描对话内容，识别用户的纠正、偏好或任务踩坑经验，并以「进化请求」卡片的形式呈现给用户审批。经用户确认后，相关内容将写入模型记忆，成为持久能力。

The Skill Store and Zhipu's self-developed GLM Office Skills have also been launched, covering five modules: PPT, DOCX, XLSX, PDF, and Charts. After integration, users can generate accompanying PPTs, speeches, and other types of files simultaneously with a single command. Skill 商店及智谱自研的 GLM Office Skills 同步上线，涵盖 PPT、DOCX、XLSX、PDF、Charts 五个模块。接入后，用户可通过单条指令同时生成配套的 PPT 与讲稿等多类文件。

item.title: 硅谷初创公司要做一个能让你用「意念」打字的帽子
item.guid: 硅谷初创公司要做一个能让你用「意念」打字的帽子
item.description:
According to WIRED, Silicon Valley startup Sabi recently announced it is developing a non-invasive brain-computer interface (BCI) device shaped like a beanie, aiming to allow ordinary users to type on a screen simply by "thought." The company's initial target typing speed is about 30 words per minute, with expectations for continuous improvement as users spend more time with the device. 据 WIRED 报道，硅谷初创公司 Sabi 近日宣布，正在开发一款外形酷似毛线帽的非侵入式脑机接口（BCI）设备，目标是让普通用户仅凭「意念」即可在屏幕上打字。公司初期目标打字速度约为每分钟 30 个词，并预计随着用户使用时长的增加持续提升。

The device is based on electroencephalography (EEG) technology, collecting brain electrical signals through metal sensors attached to the scalp, which then decode the user's "internal language." The hat has 70,000 to 100,000 miniature sensors built-in to compensate for signal attenuation caused by the skull's obstruction in wearable devices. 该设备基于脑电图（EEG）技术，通过贴附于头皮的金属传感器采集大脑电信号，进而解码用户的「内部语言」。帽子内置 7 万至 10 万个微型传感器，以此弥补可穿戴设备因颅骨阻隔导致的信号衰减问题。

Sabi CEO Rahul Chhabra stated that the first product is expected to be officially released by the end of this year, with a baseball cap version also under simultaneous development. Sabi CEO Rahul Chhabra 表示，首款产品预计于今年年底正式发售，棒球帽版本也在同步研发中。

item.title: 《王者荣耀世界》官方道歉，公布多项优化计划
item.guid: 《王者荣耀世界》官方道歉，公布多项优化计划
item.description:
Recently, the production team of "Honor of Kings World" released its first-week report, providing optimization progress on various player feedback issues. 日前，《王者荣耀世界》制作组发布首周汇报，就多项玩家反馈问题给出优化进度。

Addressing numerous experience issues present in the early stages of the game's launch, such as unskippable cutscenes and slow early-game pacing, the production team apologized to players and stated that they have fully activated a "rapid response iteration" mechanism, directly converting player feedback into patch schedules. 针对游戏上线初期存在过场无法跳过、开局节奏缓慢等诸多体验问题，制作组向玩家致歉，并表示已全面开启「快速响应迭代」机制，将玩家反馈直接转化为补丁排期。

Regarding the highly requested mini-map feature, the production team stated that the mini-map was not designed previously out of consideration for guiding players to adapt to the "above ground + underground" three-dimensional map structure, but admitted that this design was "taken for granted." The mini-map has now been added to the development plan and is expected to be launched in the S1 version. 对于玩家呼声较高的小地图功能，制作组表示此前未设计小地图，是出于引导玩家适应「地上 + 地下」立体地图结构的考量，但承认这一设计「想当然」。目前小地图已加入开发计划，预计在 S1 版本上线。

Regarding the issue of the "phantom" social feature interfering with immersion, the production team stated that they will rethink the design logic and promised that "social interaction in 'Honor of Kings World' will not be mandatory," allowing players to switch freely at any time. 对于「虚影」社交功能干扰沉浸感的问题，制作组表示将重新思考设计逻辑，并承诺「《王者荣耀世界》的社交不会是强制社交」，玩家可随时自由切换。

item.title: 瑞幸将上线瓶装咖啡，售价 6-7 元
item.guid: 瑞幸将上线瓶装咖啡，售价-6-7-元
item.description:
According to LatePost, Luckin Coffee will launch ready-to-drink bottled products by the end of April, with the first batch including three products: Classic Americano, Grapefruit C Americano, and Coconut Latte, priced at 6–7 yuan per bottle. 据晚点 LatePost 报道，瑞幸咖啡将于 4 月底上线即饮瓶装产品，首批推出经典美式、柚 C 美式和生椰拿铁 3 款产品，单瓶定价 6–7 元。

Sources close to the channels confirmed that a batch of distributors completed signing in early April and will gradually receive goods and distribute them to terminals within the month. Luckin has not restricted sales channels; convenience stores, snack bulk stores, and mom-and-pop shops can all sell the products. Luckin officially stated that the main focus is on establishing modern channels such as convenience stores, supermarkets, and vending machines. 接近渠道的人士确认，一批经销商已于 4 月初完成签约，将于月内陆续到货并铺向终端。瑞幸未限制销售渠道，便利店、零食量贩店及夫妻店均可销售。瑞幸官方表示，主要重点在于铺设便利店、超市、自动贩卖机等现代化渠道。

On the production side, Luckin has not built its own production lines; the ready-to-drink products are manufactured by Huizhou Tongshi Enterprise Co., Ltd., a subsidiary of Uni-President Group, which has long provided OEM services for brands such as Red Bull, Wanglaoji, and Nongfu Spring. The commissioning party is Luckin Coffee Technology (Hainan) Co., Ltd. 生产端，瑞幸并未自建产线，即饮产品由惠州统实企业有限公司代工，该公司隶属于统一集团，长期为红牛、王老吉、农夫山泉等品牌提供代工服务，委托方为瑞幸咖啡科技（海南）有限公司。

item.title: 7 家头部平台因「幽灵外卖」被罚没 35.97 亿元
item.guid: 7-家头部平台因「幽灵外卖」被罚没-35.97-亿元
item.description:
According to Xinhua News Agency, the State Administration for Market Regulation yesterday issued administrative penalties for the "Ghost Takeaway" series of cases involving seven e-commerce platforms: Pinduoduo, Meituan, JD.com, Ele.me (now Taobao Flash Sale), Douyin, Taobao, and Tmall. The seven platforms were ordered to rectify their illegal acts and were fined a total of 3.597 billion yuan. 据新华社报道，国家市场监督管理总局昨日对拼多多、美团、京东、饿了么（现淘宝闪购）、抖音、淘宝、天猫 7 家电商平台的「幽灵外卖」系列案作出行政处罚决定，责令 7 家平台改正违法行为，并处罚没款共计 35.97 亿元。

Upon investigation, the aforementioned seven e-commerce platforms were found to have three main violations: 经查，上述 7 家电商平台存在三项主要违规行为：

    Failed to strictly review and approve licenses for online food business operators, and did not perform qualification review obligations according to law;

    Signed cooperation agreements with order transfer platforms, and knew or should have known that order transfer behavior infringed upon consumers' legitimate rights and interests, but failed to take necessary measures;

    The platform's legal representative and food safety director failed to fully perform their food safety management responsibilities.

All 7 platforms were ordered to suspend the addition of new cake shops for a period ranging from 3 to 9 months. After the investigation was launched, the State Administration for Market Regulation immediately instructed each platform to make immediate rectifications. Currently, all 7 e-commerce platforms have delisted unreviewed "ghost shops" and ceased cooperation with relevant order transfer platforms for catering order transfers. 7 家平台均被责令暂停新增蛋糕店铺，期限为 3 至 9 个月不等。案件启动调查后，市场监管总局第一时间责成各平台立行立改，目前 7 家电商平台均已下架未经审核的「幽灵店铺」，并停止与相关转单平台的餐饮转单合作。

item.title: 《门牙》定档 5 月 1 日
item.guid: 《门牙》定档-5-月-1-日
item.description:
The realistic film "Front Teeth" officially announced its release date yesterday and will be screened nationwide on May 1st. 现实题材电影《门牙》昨日正式官宣定档，将于 5 月 1 日全国上映。

The film is written and directed by emerging director Li Xin, starring Zhang Yu and Chen Haoyu. The story begins with a minor accident in life: the male protagonist Li Weiyang (played by Zhang Yu) is involved in a collision while riding a motorcycle, causing his girlfriend Shen Qing (played by Chen Haoyu) to lose two front teeth. 影片由新锐导演李心自编自导，章宇、陈昊宇领衔主演。故事以一场生活中的微小意外为切口：男主角李未阳（章宇 饰）骑摩托车时遭遇碰撞，导致女友沈青（陈昊宇 饰）失去两颗门牙。

The financially strapped Li Weiyang insists on getting the best front teeth for his girlfriend, for which he has to negotiate with the at-fault party and insurance company, completely disrupting his previously modest but peaceful life. 囊中羞涩的李未阳坚持要为女友装上最好的门牙，为此不得不与肇事者及保险公司展开多方周旋，原本拮据却平静的生活就此被彻底打乱。

item.title: One Fun Thing｜高德机器狗视频曝光：能帮买奶茶
item.guid: One-Fun-Thing｜高德机器狗视频曝光：能帮买奶茶
item.description:
According to Sina Technology, several netizens recently posted videos claiming to have encountered an Amap robot dog crossing the road and buying milk tea downstairs from the Amap building. The videos show the robot dog with the Amap LOGO printed on its body. 据新浪科技消息，日前有多位网友发布视频称，在高德地图楼下遇到高德机器狗过马路和买奶茶。从视频中看到，机器狗身上印有高德地图 LOGO。

The report stated that a relevant Amap representative recently said that Amap has made extensive arrangements in the field of embodied intelligence and is actively exploring hardware product forms such as quadruped robots and humanoid robots, with the first quadruped robot expected to be released soon. 报道表示，高德相关负责人日前表示，高德已在具身智能领域开展深入布局，并积极探索四足机器人、人形机器人等硬件产品形态，预计近期将有首款四足机器人发布。

According to videos shot by netizens, the Amap robot dog waits for the green light by itself when crossing the road, and actively avoids pedestrians it encounters while moving forward. 根据网友拍摄的视频，高德机器狗过马路会自己等待绿灯，然后前行过程中遇到路人还会主动避让。

In addition, at a milk tea shop, the Amap robot dog can enter the store by itself, tell the staff how many milk teas to pick up, and after the staff hands the milk tea to the robot dog, it can autonomously leave the store and walk back to Amap headquarters. 此外，在一个奶茶店，高德机器狗能自己进入店内，并告知店员要取多少号奶茶，店员将奶茶交给机器狗之后，它能自主出门并走回了高德总部。

Public information shows that Amap established its Embodied Business Unit in January this year, and has since released multiple embodied models, achieving SOTA (State-Of-The-Art) in over a dozen authoritative evaluations. 公开资料显示，高德于今年 1 月成立具身业务部，目前已发布多个具身模型，并且在十余项权威评测中实现 SOTA。

item.title: 周末看什么｜《史努比：花生大电影》
item.guid: 周末看什么｜《史努比：花生大电影》
item.description:
"The Peanuts Movie" is adapted from Charles M. Schulz's classic comic strip "Peanuts," created in 1950. 《史努比：花生大电影》改编自查尔斯·M·舒尔茨创作于 1950 年的经典漫画《花生》。

The film progresses with a dual storyline: the main plot follows the perpetually unlucky but kind Charlie Brown (voiced by Noah Schnapp) as he secretly admires the "Little Red-Haired Girl" (voiced by Francesca Capaldi), seeking self-worth amidst repeated setbacks; 影片以双线结构推进：主线跟随一贯倒霉却善良的查理·布朗（诺亚·施纳普配音）暗恋「红发小女孩」（弗朗西斯卡·卡帕尔迪配音），在屡屡受挫中寻找自我价值；

The subplot features Snoopy (voiced by Bill Melendez) as an ace pilot, engaging in aerial dogfights with his arch-nemesis "The Red Baron" in a fantasy world, and encountering his dream girl "Fifi" (voiced by Kristin Chenoweth). 副线则呈现史努比（比尔·莫伦茨配音）化身王牌飞行员，在幻想世界中与宿敌「红色男爵」展开空中对决，并邂逅梦中情人「菲菲」（克里斯汀·肯诺恩斯配音）。

Visually, the film uses CG technology to highly restore Schulz's comic's iconic simple lines, exaggerated body movements, and anime-style character designs, earning it the audience's praise as "a perfect restoration." 在视觉呈现上，影片以 CG 技术高度还原了舒尔茨漫画标志性的简笔线条、夸张肢体动作与二次元造型风格，被观众评价为「神还原」。

item.title: 买书不读指南｜《本心》：当 AI 复活逝者，人类如何直面「本心」
item.guid: 买书不读指南｜《本心》：当-AI-复活逝者，人类如何直面「本心」
item.description:
"Honshin" (The Core) is a novel by Japanese author Keiichiro Hirano, set in a near future where technology is highly advanced. 《本心》是日本作家平野启一郎创作的长篇小说，故事设定于技术高度成熟的近未来。

Six months after his mother's accidental death, the protagonist Sakuya Ishikawa uses VF (Virtual Figure) technology to resurrect his mother as a virtual reality image, attempting to uncover the true reason behind her desire for a "free death" during her lifetime. 主人公石川朔也在母亲因意外去世半年后，借助 VF（Virtual Figure）技术让母亲以虚拟现实形象重生，试图探寻她生前渴望「自由死」的真实原因。

However, does the mother "resurrected" from data computation truly possess a "heart"? As Sakuya pieces together an image of his mother from the people she knew during her lifetime, an image starkly different from his memories, the novel's inquiry deepens: 然而，从数据运算中「复活」的母亲究竟有没有「心」？随着朔也从母亲生前接触的人们口中拼凑出一个与记忆中截然不同的形象，小说的追问也逐渐深入：

When "reunion" becomes achievable, will people truly get closer to the truth of their loved ones, or will they fall deeper into the denial of loss?

The novel incorporates real-world issues such as wealth disparity, loneliness, meaninglessness, and grief into its narrative, re-examining what it means to lose, to love, and to live in an era where technology can continuously postpone goodbyes. 小说将贫富差距、孤独感、无意义感、丧亲之痛等现实议题一并纳入叙事，在技术可以不断替人延后告别的时代，重新追问何为失去、何为爱、何为活着。

item.title: 游戏推荐｜《暗黑破坏神 Ⅳ》将开启免费领取
item.guid: 游戏推荐｜《暗黑破坏神-Ⅳ》将开启免费领取
item.description:
Yesterday, the official Chinese server of "Diablo IV" announced that the game will be available for a limited-time free claim, with a new expansion pack launching simultaneously on April 28. 昨日，《暗黑破坏神 Ⅳ》国服官方宣布，游戏国服将开启限时免费领取，同时 4 月 28 日全新扩展包同步上线。

    Limited-time free claim of the base game, permanent addition to library: New players can visit the official page between April 28 at 0:00 and May 27 at 23:59 to claim the "Diablo IV" base game for free (original price 128 yuan, now 0 yuan). Once claimed, it will be permanently added to your library.

    Exclusive 2400 Platinum Coin reward for veteran players: All players who owned any version of "Diablo IV" on the Chinese server before April 28 can claim 2400 Platinum Coins for free between April 28 at 0:00 and May 27 at 23:59.

    New Mythic Skin upon reaching max level: Both new and veteran players will receive a new limited-edition Mythic series skin after the "Lord of Hatred" expansion pack goes live.

早报
